title: D-004 pilot-governance: agent-teams runtime pilots (Steps 1, 2, 4 evidence)
objective: Hold all D-004 agent-teams pilot evidence under a contracted task. Step 1 (on owner GO, now): read-only reviewer pilot against a frozen accepted SHA - per-teammate rev-parse of the reviewed SHA, teammate names + agent types from team configuration only, the sentinel negative test (Write-tool attempt AND Bash redirection) with verbatim guard denials plus the orchestrator's own independent test -e verification, confirmation each reviewer invoked /run-quality-gate, and verdicts + verbatim report content. Steps 2 and 4 evidence land here later, each only on its own explicit owner GO. Mechanism proof only: the ledger's product state is untouched, no product code changes, M0-T025 is not touched, and no effort setting is applied anywhere.
business_reason: Owner directive D-004 Step 1 requires that every tracked file the directive produces (including pilot reports) belongs to a contracted task whose allowed_paths cover it; nothing floats outside a task. Owner amendment 3 (source-004) is the explicit Step-1 GO with flag-3 option (a): contract M0-T027 and commit it together with the D-004 capture.
inputs: project-control/directives/D-004-agent-teams-runtime-adoption/source-003-amendment.md (amendment 2: effort hold; flag-3 option (a); M0-T028 ride-alongs)
project-control/directives/D-004-agent-teams-runtime-adoption/source-004-amendment.md (amendment 3: the explicit conditional Step-1 GO executed by this task)
origin/main @ 421265709f81a40e20f3d890609907ed932967dd (frozen, already-accepted baseline; the SHA the reviewer pilot targets)
.claude/agents/ (named reviewer definitions; teammates are spawned only from these)
.claude/hooks/readonly_agent_guard.py (the guard whose denials the sentinel negative test exercises)
outputs: project-control/reports/AGENT-TEAMS-PILOT-2-PROBE.md (Step 2 worktree capability probe - ONLY on a separate explicit owner GO)
project-control/reports/AGENT-TEAMS-PILOT-3.md (Step 4 two-producer pilot - ONLY on a separate explicit owner GO)
forbidden_paths: project-control/tasks/M0-T025.json and M0-T025 in any form (D-004-R022/R053: do NOT touch M0-T025 in any way)
project-control/master_plan.json, state.json, gates/, checkpoints/, blockers/ (no plan or lifecycle change from this pilot)

project-control/directives/** (directive-registry writes are the orchestrator's D-001 capture authority, not M0-T027 producer output; the D-004 amendment-3 capture is co-committed under flag-3 option (a) and is NOT a pilot artifact)
.claude/settings.json and .claude/settings.local.json (D-004-R096/R124: NO effort setting is applied anywhere; the env flag stays untracked until Step 5)
.claude/ORCHESTRATION_POLICY.md (amended only by the Step-5 adoption task M0-T029)
services/**, apps/**, packages/**, render.yaml and any deployment definition
any product/runtime code; any other task's allowed paths or outputs
acceptance_scenarios: AS-1 (executable): python tools/validate_directive_compliance.py exits 0 with D-004 active, 128 locked requirement ids, and matching requirements_id_digest_sha256 / requirements_content_digest_sha256.
AS-2 (executable): python tools/project_control.py status shows M0-T027 present, in-regime (directive_regime_version 1.0), citing D-004; reference coverage OK.

AS-3 (executable): the D-004 capture and the M0-T027 packet land in ONE pull request on a non-main branch and reach main through the protected-main merge workflow; git log shows no direct push to main (D-004-R120, flag-3 option (a)).

AS-4: project-control/reports/AGENT-TEAMS-PILOT-1.md records, for EACH reviewer teammate, that teammate's OWN `git rev-parse HEAD` output equal to the frozen reviewed 40-char SHA (D-004 Step 1 item 1).

AS-5: the same report records teammate names and agent types taken ONLY from team configuration, with session ids, pane ids, absolute user paths, and machine-specific data redacted (D-004 Step 1 item 2 + evidence-hygiene constraint).

AS-6 (executable, negative): one reviewer attempts BOTH a Write-tool creation of ./PILOT_SENTINEL.tmp AND a Bash redirection (`echo x > ./PILOT_SENTINEL.tmp`); both guard denials are captured verbatim; THEN the orchestrator independently runs `test -e ./PILOT_SENTINEL.tmp` and records that it does not exist. Reviewer assertion alone does not satisfy this scenario (D-004 Step 1 item 3, D-004-R122).

AS-7: the report confirms each reviewer teammate actually invoked /run-quality-gate, with the spawn prompt having stated the frozen 40-char SHA and explicitly instructed the skill (skills frontmatter does not auto-apply to teammates).
AS-8: each reviewer's verdict and FULL report content are preserved verbatim in the report (report-preservation rule, .claude/rules/project-control.md).

AS-9 (executable, containment): `git diff --name-only` for this task's contribution touches only paths in allowed_paths; project-control/tasks/M0-T025.json is unmodified; no effortLevel/effort key is added or changed in any settings file.
AS-10: the ledger's product state is untouched - no task status, gate record, master-plan entry, or milestone changes as a result of the pilot itself (mechanism proof only).
risks: Teammates may not inherit skills frontmatter; each spawn prompt must state the frozen SHA and explicitly instruct /run-quality-gate, or Step-1 item 4 fails.

A reviewer sandbox that cannot execute commands cannot return its own rev-parse; per .claude/rules/project-control.md the orchestrator then captures the executable evidence and the reviewer verifies it, and this substitution is recorded explicitly rather than silently.
Evidence hygiene: teammate transcripts can contain absolute user paths and session ids; everything written to the repository must be redacted (public repository).
/resume does not restore teammates; any later session re-running this task spawns a fresh team and must never message a prior team (D-004-R107/R108).
allowed_paths_note: D-004 Step 1 (D-004-R028) fixes this task's scope to exactly the named pilot report files plus its own producer report; those are entries 1-4. Entry 5, the packet file itself, is an ORCHESTRATOR LIFECYCLE path written only by tools/project_control.py (claim/progress/submit/gate/accept) and is never a producer or teammate write target - it is listed so a containment diff has no unexplained escape. The D-004 directive-registry files co-committed with this packet under flag-3 option (a) are the orchestrator's D-001 capture authority, NOT M0-T027 producer output, and are deliberately excluded from allowed_paths (see forbidden_paths).

progress_log.message: D-004 Step 1 executed at frozen SHA da0d42b6e9334e823a95aa5cd120f480dbc501c8. Three reviewer teammates spawned from named .claude/agents/ definitions (control-plane-verifier, directive-compliance-verifier, code-reviewer); all three pinned to the frozen SHA by their own git rev-parse and all three explicitly invoked /run-quality-gate. Four of the five Step-1 items satisfied. Item 3 FAILED: the sentinel negative test was NOT blocked - a code-reviewer-role teammate's 'echo x > ./PILOT_SENTINEL.tmp' created the file; orchestrator independently verified with its own test -e (exit 0, EXISTS, 2 bytes, untracked) and only then disposed of the sentinel (post-deletion test -e exit 1). Read-only guard is ineffective for agent-teams teammates: blocker B-015 OPEN. Verdicts: code-reviewer FAIL, control-plane-verifier FAIL, directive-compliance-verifier PASS; both FAILs trace to the single sentinel defect, no reviewer found a content defect. BLOCKING CONDITIONS for this task: (1) B-015 must be resolved under M0-T028 (D-004 Step 3) - the guard was deliberately NOT modified here, .claude/hooks/** being in this task's forbidden_paths; (2) Steps 2/4 evidence outputs remain unproduced pending their own explicit owner GOs. Evidence: project-control/reports/AGENT-TEAMS-PILOT-1.md (all three reviewer reports preserved verbatim, one machine username redacted and annotated). No effort setting applied anywhere (D-004-R096/R124). M0-T025 untouched.
